queries.question: Show all the football players as well as the intermediate-level rugby players.
queries.sql:
SELECT Players.Name 
FROM Sports JOIN Players ON Sports.id = Players.SportId JOIN PlayerStats ON Players.id = PlayerStats.PlayerId JOIN FitnessLevels ON PlayerStats.FitnessLevelId = FitnessLevels.id
WHERE Sports.SportName = "Football" OR Sports.SportName = "Rugby" AND FitnessLevels.LevelName = "Intermediate"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?sports a :Sports .
  ?players a :Players .
  ?players p:hasSports ?sports .
  ?playerstats a :PlayerStats .
  ?playerstats p:hasPlayers ?players .
  ?fitnesslevels a :Fitness_Level .
  ?playerstats p:hasFitnessLevels ?fitnesslevels .
  ?players p:name ?name .
  ?sports p:SportName ?sportname_w .
  ?sports p:SportName ?sportname_w2 .
  ?fitnesslevels p:LevelName ?levelname_w .
  FILTER((STR(?sportname_w) = "Football" || (STR(?sportname_w2) = "Rugby" && STR(?levelname_w) = "Intermediate")))
}

queries.question: Give me all the players, for both rugby and football, who play at an intermediate level.
queries.sql:
SELECT Players.Name 
FROM Sports JOIN Players ON Sports.id = Players.SportId JOIN PlayerStats ON Players.id = PlayerStats.PlayerId JOIN FitnessLevels ON PlayerStats.FitnessLevelId = FitnessLevels.id
WHERE (Sports.SportName = "Football" OR Sports.SportName = "Rugby") AND FitnessLevels.LevelName = "Intermediate"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?sports a :Sports .
  ?players a :Players .
  ?players p:hasSports ?sports .
  ?playerstats a :PlayerStats .
  ?playerstats p:hasPlayers ?players .
  ?fitnesslevels a :Fitness_Level .
  ?playerstats p:hasFitnessLevels ?fitnesslevels .
  ?players p:name ?name .
  ?sports p:SportName ?sportname_w .
  ?sports p:SportName ?sportname_w2 .
  ?fitnesslevels p:LevelName ?levelname_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?sportname_w) = "Football" || STR(?sportname_w2) = "Rugby")) && STR(?levelname_w) = "Intermediate"))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: List all the football players and rugby players who play at the intermediate level.
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE attachment {
  low: { SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?sports a :Sports .
  ?players a :Players .
  ?players p:hasSports ?sports .
  ?playerstats a :PlayerStats .
  ?playerstats p:hasPlayers ?players .
  ?fitnesslevels a :Fitness_Level .
  ?playerstats p:hasFitnessLevels ?fitnesslevels .
  ?players p:name ?name .
  ?sports p:SportName ?sportname_w .
  ?sports p:SportName ?sportname_w2 .
  ?fitnesslevels p:LevelName ?levelname_w .
  FILTER((STR(?sportname_w) = "Football" || (STR(?sportname_w2) = "Rugby" && STR(?levelname_w) = "Intermediate")))
} }
  high: { SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?sports a :Sports .
  ?players a :Players .
  ?players p:hasSports ?sports .
  ?playerstats a :PlayerStats .
  ?playerstats p:hasPlayers ?players .
  ?fitnesslevels a :Fitness_Level .
  ?playerstats p:hasFitnessLevels ?fitnesslevels .
  ?players p:name ?name .
  ?sports p:SportName ?sportname_w .
  ?sports p:SportName ?sportname_w2 .
  ?fitnesslevels p:LevelName ?levelname_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?sportname_w) = "Football" || STR(?sportname_w2) = "Rugby")) && STR(?levelname_w) = "Intermediate"))
} }
}
